channel.title: Tim's Game Lab
channel.description: Daily HTML5 browser games. New build most days.

item.title: Treasure Sweep Web
item.description: Sweep a detector across sandy dig sites, follow the signal pulse, brush out relics, then upgrade your kit and unlock richer locations.

item.title: Debris Magneto
item.description: Roll a giant magnet ball across a junk-strewn arena: small scrap snaps on instantly, big scrap needs repeated passes, then dump your load at the recycler before the ball maxes out.

item.title: Route Merchant
item.description: Draw rail lines between cargo stations, route colored crates to the right buyers, and upgrade bottleneck hubs into a humming logistics empire.

item.title: Knotwood
item.description: Drag carved wooden blocks onto an 8x8 board, fill a full row or column to clear it, and build combo streaks. No timer, just space.

item.title: Gulp Rush
item.description: Drag a hungry void around a town, swallow everything smaller than you, grow, and out-eat an AI rival before time runs out.

item.title: Crash Descent 2D
item.description: Keep a battered car flipping downhill for points, repairs, and one more risky jump.

item.title: Merge Outpost TD
item.description: Merge turrets during each wave, patch the road, and hold the outpost until the boss breaks.

item.title: Screw Shelf Jam
item.description: Unscrew color bolts from packed boards, match shelves, and trigger tidy combo clears.

item.title: Beacon Bay
item.description: Match gems to rebuild a sleepy lighthouse harbor.

item.title: Twin Town
item.description: Spot every difference between two cozy towns.

item.title: Roost
item.description: Net fluttering bats in a moonlit cave - every species you catch adds its own voice to the cave's song.

item.title: Pool Tape
item.description: Recover phrase letters from a flooded VHS pool clinic before the camera dies.

item.title: Bubble Barrage
item.description: Pop glossy drifting bubbles by hand while edge turrets evolve into an auto-popping machine.

item.title: Bandlings
item.description: Your monsters ARE the music: every creature plays a part on one shared groove - merge them and hear the song grow.

item.title: Shipwreck Scrub
item.description: Scrape three layers of sea-grime off sunken ships, pocket the treasure underneath, and buy meaner tools for deeper wrecks

item.title: Asteroid Farm Rush
item.description: Harvest growing asteroids before they spoil — time your taps to maximize yield and stop the rot from spreading

item.title: Mirror Drift
item.description: Aim a single laser and bounce it off angled mirrors to strike enemies before they reach your core — one beam, infinite angles.

item.title: Tank Forge
item.description: Forge a tank from puzzle blocks - your blocks ARE the hit points, and they shear off chunk by chunk in battle

item.title: Parry Knight
item.description: Read the monster's wind-up, tap the exact parry window, counter-kill, grab the loot — descend until the dungeon breaks you.

item.title: Cargo Jam
item.description: Tap arrow-crates to slide them off a packed dock — catch 3 of a color in the tray before it overflows.

item.title: Spore Merge
item.description: Merge spores to defend the hive. Every death evolves a new organ to come back stronger.

item.title: Vacuum Rush
item.description: Suck up the mess room by room, grow your suction, and chase the perfect clean.

item.title: Laser Drill
item.description: Drag a laser drill through ore veins, manage the heat, chain combos, and dig ever deeper.

item.title: Prison Dig
item.description: Tunnel out past guard sightlines and timed sweeps. Plan the route, bank ore, upgrade, escape.

item.title: Noob Rider
item.description: Floor it through crumbling biomes, smash through hazards, and rebuild a tougher ride every run.

item.title: Tank Blitz
item.description: Classic tank arena reborn: blast brick mazes, defend your star base, upgrade between waves

item.title: Class Master
item.description: You are the teacher: run the lesson, dodge the riot, climb Grade 1 to 11

item.title: War Table
item.description: Arrange your tiny army, send them into the clash, then recruit and upgrade to crush bigger and bigger hordes.

item.title: Claw Tycoon
item.description: Run a claw-machine arcade: aim and drop the claw to grab adorable plushies, sell them for coins, then upgrade your claws and machines to grow a prize empire.

item.title: Crash Buggy
item.description: Rev, launch your blocky buggy off the ramp and smash everything for miles.

item.title: Pet Vet Rush
item.description: Match each arriving pet to the right treatment station, keep the waiting room happy, and grow a bustling animal clinic.

item.title: Crystal Cavern
item.description: Dig deeper, strike richer crystals, automate a mining empire — then restake the claim to dig even deeper.

item.title: Frost Melt
item.description: Melt the ice, free the treasure

item.title: Snow Day
item.description: Clear every flake

item.title: Niche Keeper
item.description: Build a living food web where every creature has one prey and one predator — leave a gap and the whole web collapses.

item.title: Grain Road
item.description: Buy grain cheap, sell it dear across Silk Road cities — but your own bulk trades move the price against you.

item.title: Idle Noodle Bar
item.description: Tap to cook and serve ramen for coins, hire auto-cooks that earn while you watch, unlock new dishes that multiply income, and renovate for permanent boosts.

item.title: Critter Survivor
item.description: Steer your hero, auto-blast a thickening swarm of cute critters, level up and draft powers to outlast the horde.

item.title: Styled Heart
item.description: Style your crush for every date and win his heart.

item.title: Orb Champions
item.description: Match orbs to power your champions and summon a legendary team.

item.title: Stellar Hearts
item.description: Read his mood, play the right card, and win his heart among the stars.

item.title: Noob Run
item.description: Tap to jump, double-jump and slam the blocky Noob past lava, spikes and saws. How far can you run?

item.title: Relic Restore
item.description: Restore lost treasures to their glory

item.title: Merge Diner
item.description: Drag matching ingredients to merge them up into dishes, then serve customer orders before your counter jams.

item.title: Rage Room
item.description: Smash a whole room to bits. Chain combos, fill the RAGE bar, and blow it all up at once.

item.title: Gem Cases
item.description: Crack open glowing cases, spin the reel and pull rare gems - keep the legendaries, sell the dupes, and fill your vault. How rare can you go?

item.title: Bolus
item.description: Drag a hungry food lump down a twisting gut, weaving past spiky red blobs and clenching pinch-rings while you swallow golden pellets. Clear the tract and it loops faster - how deep can you ride before you are digested?

item.title: Critter Siege
item.description: A weird-cute critter horde floods down the lanes at your hearth — drop auto-zapping defenders to hold the last line. Every wave brings a new monster and a new tool.

item.title: Backrooms
item.description: You noclipped into the endless yellow rooms. Descend deeper and escape the thing hunting you in the dark.

item.title: Spell or Spoil
item.description: Spell words by dragging across a letter grid, but every turn the rot creeps to neighbouring tiles — spell next to the mold to contain it before the board spoils.

item.title: Deck of Dread
item.description: Draw a hand of spell-cards, read the monster's next move, then blast it before it strikes — win to loot a new card and face something worse. How deep can your deck go?

item.title: Coin Cascade
item.description: Drop coins into the vault well — two of a kind FUSE into a richer coin, chain the cascades, and climb from copper to crown before a column overflows.

item.title: Boba Rush
item.description: Run a cozy bubble-tea bar — pour, top, and serve each customer's order before their patience runs out. New flavors and a faster rush every minute.

item.title: Smelter Tycoon
item.description: Tap the furnace to smelt ore into gold, buy auto-smelters, and climb the metal tiers — but keep the heat down or the whole foundry melts down.

item.title: Hoard
item.description: Catch the falling treasure and bank each bowl a heartbeat before it overflows.

item.title: Beast Bazaar
item.description: Tap the nest to hatch critters, merge two of a kind into chonkier beasts, and fill each customer's order — before the board gridlocks.

item.title: Trolls & Dungeons
item.description: Indie community submission

item.title: Devourling
item.description: Survive an endless swarm — auto-attack, gobble glowing motes, and evolve from a tiny critter into a screen-clearing monster.

item.title: Flip Dash
item.description: One tap flips gravity — sprint along the floor, flip to the ceiling, weave through every hazard. How far can you dash?

item.title: Tile Trio
item.description: A heap of overlapping picture-tiles — tap a tile to send it to your tray; three of a kind pop and vanish. Clear the whole pile before your 7-slot tray jams.

item.title: Scrub Master
item.description: Scrub away grime, rust, and stains layer by layer to restore filthy objects to a spotless shine.

item.title: Bolt Out
item.description: Tap to unscrew colored bolts and drop them into matching boxes — clear every bolt to free the panels.

item.title: Orbit Dodge
item.description: A glowing ball orbits a core — tap to flip its spin and slip through the gap in each incoming ring. How far can you weave?

item.title: Word Sweep
item.description: Drag across a grimy grid of letters to spell words — each word washes its letters clean and fresh tiles tumble in.

item.title: Color Gate
item.description: Tap to bounce up through spinning color rings - slip through only the arc that matches your color.

item.title: Tight Spot
item.description: Thread a car into impossibly tight parking spots - one scrape and it resets.

item.title: Peel It!
item.description: Drag from the corner to peel the film off in one clean motion — then the sticker, then the dust underneath — until the whole thing gleams.

item.title: Spark Shield
item.description: Sparks rush your core from every direction — spin your shield to catch each one before it hits. One miss and the core blows.

item.title: Tidepool
item.description: Eat to grow, but the exit gates only fit a precise size — gorge too much and you're stuck, so let a predator nip you to shrink back down.

item.title: Limelight
item.description: Move one spotlight across a plaza; whoever you light adopts a mood that spreads to their neighbors — orchestrate the whole crowd into joy before panic infects them.

item.title: Merge Conquest
item.description: Merge units into stronger ones, then send your army to crush the enemy line — a tactical merge-battler.

item.title: Power Wash
item.description: Aim the pressure jet and blast layers of grime off filthy objects until they gleam — hit 100% clean before the water tank runs dry.

item.title: Parry Core
item.description: Projectiles streak in from every edge — tap the side they're coming from to deflect them off your core. One slip and a life is gone; the swarm only gets faster.

item.title: Bumper Ball
item.description: Flick a bumper-car puck like a pool cue to knock the ball into the goal — within a tight, shareable shot budget.

item.title: Volatile Sort
item.description: Pour colored fluids between tubes like classic ball-sort — except certain color pairs are VOLATILE and detonate if they ever sit adjacent, so you sort to SEPARATE, not just to match.

item.title: Last Peg
item.description: Jump one peg over another into the empty hole beyond, removing it — chain jumps until a single peg remains.

item.title: Pixel Reveal
item.description: Read the row and column clues to deduce which cells are filled and uncover a hidden pixel picture — without burning your error tokens.

item.title: Crowd Crusher
item.description: Steer your heavy mass through a packed crowd, swell on pellets, and bulldoze every smaller foe off the platform before they surround you.

item.title: Bus Bay Jam
item.description: Dock buses into open bays so colour-matched passengers board from an immovable queue — clear the whole queue before all three bays deadlock.

item.title: Comet Tether
item.description: Lasso a planet, let gravity whip you into orbit, release to slingshot to the exit gate.

item.title: Shadow Cast
item.description: Arrange blocks between a lamp and a wall so their shadow matches the target silhouette.

item.title: Hue Sort
item.description: Pour one colour onto another and they BLEND — un-mix your way back to pure tubes.

item.title: Last Embers
item.description: An incremental game where the numbers only go DOWN — no growth, no prestige, just a dwindling hoard of logs and food you must ration to outlast a deepening winter.

item.title: Updrift
item.description: Every mining game digs down — this one digs UP, and gravity is your enemy: carve a shaft toward the surface while loosened debris rains down on your head and your oxygen drains with every swing.

item.title: Fairy Ring
item.description: Drop spores into a quiet forest grid and watch each bloom into an expanding ring of mushrooms — time your placements so the rings overlap and merge for combo multipliers before your pouch runs dry.

item.title: Cargo Cult Vote
item.description: Sort 5 of 7 freighter cargo silhouettes into Useful, Useless, or Sacred each generation — sacred locks a family for two generations.

item.title: Wishlist Wheel
item.description: You're the CEO — pin five release dates on the year calendar and survive four quarters of leaks, slips, and exec walkouts without burning investor patience.

item.title: Facade Foreman
item.description: A movie camera car drives a top-down film backlot — layer fake window/AC/balcony chips on building flats along its route before the take starts.

item.title: Agent Budget Triage
item.description: You have $5 of API budget and a queue of 20 dev tasks — assign each task to the cheap Haiku, mid Sonnet, or expensive Opus agent without burning your runway before the milestone.

item.title: Tier-1 Repaint
item.description: Your CIS-flavored hypercasual is stuck at 0.4% CTR — swap title words, screenshot motifs, and hook copy to hit Tier-1 thresholds across three markets simultaneously.

item.title: Shit Truck
item.description: Drive a sanitation truck between overflowing bins, suck the sludge into the tank with a hold-to-vacuum nozzle, and dump at the plant before the tank ruptures.

item.title: Shader Chip Loadout
item.description: A flat dull screenshot has 8 effect zones and a tray of 12 shader chips — pick 5 that hit the publisher's hidden juice target.

item.title: Bins of Holding
item.description: A sorting game where every bin is bigger inside than outside — but the wrong items dropped together explode the bin's volume to zero.

item.title: Anti-Ant Colony
item.description: You're the QUEEN of a dying colony — sacrifice workers to seal the cracks an enemy colony is digging into YOUR walls.

item.title: Gerrymander
item.description: Drop 10 city halls on a voter map — Voronoi tessellation redraws every district line, and you must win 6 of 10 districts to seize parliament.

item.title: Lucky Egg Bias
item.description: Crack thirty eggs for random drops — but hidden bias rules tilt the odds; place lure crystals to deduce which crystal biases which item.

item.title: Trail Weaver
item.description: Steer two units leaving opposite-color trails — each can only walk on the OTHER's trail; paint 80% of the board without either getting cornered.

item.title: Tiny Dice Detective
item.description: Solve a 6-scene case by allocating 2 stat points and beating 2d6 dice checks — 3 fails and the trail goes cold.

item.title: Sausage Beam
item.description: Roll a laser-mounted sausage around a ring arena — momentum aims the beam, but the beam's recoil pushes you toward the edge.

item.title: Pruner's Tower
item.description: Tower-defense in reverse — start with a maxed defense grid and REMOVE turrets each wave to satisfy budget cuts set by city council.

item.title: Word Snake
item.description: Eat letters to grow your snake — spell real words for power boosts, avoid your own tail.

item.title: Style Mixer
item.description: Each round shows the same scene in two visual styles — pick the matching tile from a grid of 9 candidates before your guesses run out.

item.title: Satisfying Spill
item.description: Drag your mop across a tiled floor to absorb spreading spills before they reach the room's edges.

item.title: Mirror Match
item.description: Two armies on opposite sides of the board move in perfect mirror to your input — find the one move that lets your knight escape while the enemy mirror crashes into its own wall.

item.title: Reverse Tycoon
item.description: Inherit a thriving cafe and DEMOLISH it tile by tile to satisfy creditors — but each demolition kills customers whose tips were funding the next debt payment.

item.title: Anti-Match
item.description: Match-3 inverted — NEVER form a row of three same-color gems or the row explodes and crushes your column height. Survive 50 gravity drops with strategic anti-pattern.

item.title: Tiny Markov Forge
item.description: A pocket-sized Markov chain rolls procedural weapon parts each run — pick three from a streaming bag to assemble a build that survives a 5-wave gauntlet.

item.title: Shader Sell Job
item.description: Layer screen-space VFX on a plain prototype to hit a target 'feel score' before the publisher meeting — but each effect costs frame-budget you can't overspend.

item.title: Tier-1 Localiser
item.description: Translate incoming hooks across 5 region columns by spending limited glyph tokens before the queue overflows.

item.title: Token Throttle
item.description: You're a dispatcher routing tasks to cheap or expensive AI agents — pick wrong and your monthly budget burns before quota refills.

item.title: Ice Fracture Foreman
item.description: Tap a frozen lake to crack it in branching fissures, isolating fish into a shrinking pond before the cracks reach your hut.

item.title: Tiny Markov Dunge
item.description: A 200-byte room-generator paints your dungeon in real time — edit the seed before the boss spawns from your own typo.

item.title: Jelly Bounce
item.description: Slingshot a ball into a field of squishy jellies — clear every one in 5 shots. Bank-shots count, chain pops score double.

item.title: Matcha
item.description: Whisk the bowl in steady M-strokes — build foam to ceremony grade before the stroke budget runs out. Zen, no timer.

item.title: Shader Polish Sprint
item.description: Drag VFX layers (bloom, chromatic, grain, scanline, vignette, dither) onto a tiny prototype until the FEEL meter snaps green — but each layer burns polish-budget and over-stacking tanks the score.

item.title: Tiny Model Dodger
item.description: A tiny Markov model in the corner learns your dodge pattern and aims the next hazard wave at your favourite lane.

item.title: Cargo Chain Junction
item.description: Each turn flip ONE rail switch to route incoming cargo wagons into the matching colored depot — wrong depot blows the wagon and one of your three sidings.

item.title: Token Triage
item.description: Drag incoming AI requests into cheap/expensive model lanes before the budget bar empties.

item.title: Tier-1 Hook
item.description: Assemble a global-market store page from cards — title, screenshot, tag, first-frame — and beat the AI buyer panel.

item.title: Difficulty Curve
item.description: Drag tower-defense waves up or down to keep the fun-meter inside a moving target band.

item.title: Mason's Hammer
item.description: Strike a stone slab so cracks propagate exactly along your target line — without crossing forbidden veins.

item.title: Pendulum Sniper
item.description: Your crosshair is a swinging pendulum — you don't aim, you ARREST it at the right moment.

item.title: Civ Pivot
item.description: Your civ forces you to swap identity every era — pick the new culture that preserves the most of your old bonuses or your empire collapses.

item.title: Agent Dispatcher
item.description: Route incoming tasks to cheap or expensive AI agents — wrong routing burns your token budget before the queue clears.

item.title: Polish Pass
item.description: Spend a fixed budget of polish points on a 90%-done game to push it across the ship line before backers lose patience.

item.title: Core Drill
item.description: Drill core samples through soil tiles to fully reveal the daily buried artefact before charges run out.

item.title: Varnish Restore
item.description: Rub yellow varnish off a daily oil painting without scrubbing through the fragile paint beneath.

item.title: Glyph Lock
item.description: Decode today's emoji-rebus phrase in three guesses; share your guess trail like Wordle.

item.title: Overcharge Donut
item.description: Hold to charge a donut launcher; release in the sweet spot for a perfect arc, overshoot and the donut detonates on the pad.

item.title: Glacier Splitter
item.description: Tap fault lines to fracture an iceberg into chunks that exactly match buyer weight orders before your hammer pool runs out.

item.title: Wishlist Climb
item.description: Pick one marketing action per day — devlog, trailer, festival, meme — and steer your indie game from 0 to 20k wishlists before your runway burns out.

item.title: Path Foreman
item.description: Draw four color-coded village paths across a tile budget without letting any of them cross or run out of stones.

item.title: Lily Frog
item.description: Hop a frog across sinking lilypads to reach the golden fly before every pad goes under.

item.title: Frost Crack
item.description: Send cracks along a frozen lake's grid to encircle and pop out a gem before the whole sheet shatters from stress.

item.title: Forge Heir
item.description: You inherit one cursed sword and must un-forge it stroke by stroke — each hammer hit may remove a curse, expose a new one, or break the blade.

item.title: Gravity Mailman
item.description: Throw letters from a tiny planet — but each letter you launch shifts the planet's center of mass, deflecting your next throw.

item.title: Echo Locator
item.description: Ping a black void with sonar clicks to map invisible enemies and walls — every ping costs battery and reveals YOU to the things listening.

item.title: Vowel Hold'em
item.description: Five consonants in your hand, vowels flip in the middle Texas-Hold'em-style — bet that you can spell a longer word than the bot before the river reveals.

item.title: Brutalist Stack
item.description: Stack 20 concrete blocks before sunset to cast the longest shadow — squat foundations win quietly while the sun marches west.

item.title: Gunsmith Draft
item.description: Draft cards of gun parts each turn and assemble complete weapons to fill orders before the deck runs out.

item.title: Token Budget
item.description: Route tasks through cheap or expensive AI agents on a hex grid, finishing the queue before your token budget zeroes out.

item.title: Battleships Skirmish
item.description: Place your fleet, take turns guessing on a daily-seeded board, salvo bonus on streaks. One-screen browser version with shareable result card.

item.title: Donut Drift Arena
item.description: Drift a glowing donut around a dirty rink. Tighter drift line = more crumbs swept per pass.

item.title: Tower Balance
item.description: Stack physics-driven blocks on a wobbly platform. Perfect-stack streaks unlock wider blocks, tilt past 25° and the tower falls.

item.title: Bubble Pop Lab
item.description: Pop colored bubbles by drawing a line through 3+ same-color neighbours.

item.title: Junk Food Poker
item.description: Poker hands, but with food. Full Burger = Full House, Meal Deal = Flush. Sauce-card jokers add multipliers. Instantly readable.

item.title: Bacteria Bloom
item.description: Place colored bacteria on a petri-dish grid, infect adjacent cells, chain same-color = outbreak combo. Mutations + antibiotics + super-spreaders.

item.title: Tire Escape
item.description: Tire rolling horizontally through a city, bouncing off cars, signs, walls. Cops chase. Distance = score, every bounce = combo.

item.title: Creature Hunt
item.description: Multiplayer hide-and-seek in a procedural dungeon. Survive as one of 10 humans or hunt them all as the creature. Real-time online or solo with bots.

item.title: Daily Dodge
item.description: 60-second top-down dodger. Daily seed — every player faces the exact same projectile pattern today. Beat your personal record.

item.title: Apartment Cleaner
item.description: Top-down room cleaner — 6 visually distinct rooms (Kitchen, Bathroom, Bedroom...) each with a different palette, furniture, and dirt patterns.

item.title: Rail Tycoon
item.description: Drag rails between colored stations. Cargo auto-routes to its matching color. Five strikes and you're bankrupt.

item.title: Ice Sweeper
item.description: Pilot an icebreaker over a grid of dirty ice tiles. Crack → chunk → vacuum. Chain neighbours for combo bonuses.

item.title: Clean Sweep Donut
item.description: Roll a sprinkled donut through dirty rooms, absorbing crumbs, mud, wrappers, then bigger trash. Combos for higher scores.
